news.headline: Putin: Ukrainian troops are in full isolation in Kursk.
Putin: The situation in the Kursk region is fully under Russian control.
Putin: We agree to stop fighting in Ukraine, but it should lead to long-standing peace. This have to eliminate root causes of the conflict.
Crescent Real Estate LLC promotes four executives to new leadership roles in response to continued growth and momentum.
news.summary: Crescent Real Estate LLC (Crescent) in Fort Worth, Texas, has recently announced the promotion of four top performers, in light of the company's ongoing growth and success. This move aligns with Crescent's strategic vision for the future, showcasing its commitment to recognizing talent and fostering advancement within the organization. The promotions signal a positive trend for Crescent, as it continues to expand in the market. This development comes amid a context of increasing momentum for the company.

news.headline: Middle East Data Center Construction Market projected to reach $6.99 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 23.92%. Top investors - Khazna, Equinix, Gulf Data Hub, Batelco.
news.summary: A new report on the Middle East Data Center Construction Market is now available, projecting significant growth in the coming years. Valued at USD 1.93 billion in 2024, the market is expected to reach USD 6.99 billion by 2030, with an estimated CAGR of 23.92%. Key players in the support infrastructure sector include Airedale, ABB, Alfa Laval, Caterpillar, and Johnson Controls.

news.headline: TWFG will announce Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on March 19, 2025. Conference call on March 20, 2025, at 9:00 AM CST.
news.summary: A conference call is set to take place on March 20, 2025, starting at 9:00 AM Central Standard Time. This call is an important event where participants will discuss significant topics.

news.headline: UGG introduces GoldenRise sandals, featured on HANNI for their Spring/Summer 2025 global campaign.
news.summary: Santa Barbara, California-based brand UGG® (owned by Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) has unveiled its latest sandal offering, the GoldenRise, a versatile three-in-one platform style. The Spring/Summer 2025 global campaign features musician HANNI as the face of the brand, showcasing the customizable silhouette's wearability for the perfect summer day. Embodying joy, renewal, vibrancy, and warmth, the campaign emphasizes the new sandal's appeal.

news.headline: Putin: The return of Western companies could be beneficial for everyone, we are in talks about such return.
Kiddom introduces new VA Math curriculum aligned with 2023 Math Standards for K-8 & Algebra.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, education technology company, Kiddom, unveiled Kiddom Virginia Math for K-8 and Algebra, in alignment with the Virginia Mathematics Textbook. The platform offers core curriculum solutions for schools and divisions.

news.headline: General Galactic Systems Inc. launched the updated Crystal Water Monitor for 2025, with a re-designed sensor for improved accuracy.
news.summary: Crystal Water Monitor, the top brand in advanced water monitoring technology, has introduced an enhanced sensor for increased precision and dependability. The product is brought to you by General Galactic Systems Inc., a prominent company in smart water monitoring products. Located in SAN DIEGO, this innovative upgrade is set to revolutionize the industry by providing even more reliable and accurate data. On March 13, 2025, this new development was announced, marking a significant advancement in the field. These improvements are aimed at enhancing user experience and ensuring top-notch performance.

news.headline: Russia and Belarus are ready to take military and diplomatic measures in response to NATO actions - Russia-Belarus Joint Statement.
20 schools are recognized as National Blue Ribbon Schools and Model PLC at Work.
news.summary: In March 13, 2025, in Bloomington, Indiana, the U.S. Department of Education collaborates annually with state education departments to recognize exceptional public and non-public elementary, middle, and high schools for their remarkable academic performance. This initiative aims to highlight schools that demonstrate excellence in their academic achievements.

news.headline: DCN Dx expands with new Regulatory Affairs Services, aiding in regulatory strategy, submissions, compliance for diagnostic devices.
news.summary: A company based in San Diego, DCN Dx, has recently introduced a new service focusing on Regulatory Affairs Services for point-of-use diagnostic devices. launched to streamline regulatory strategy, submission support, and compliance. This new solution by DCN Dx, which specializes in IVD CDMO and CRO services, is aimed at aiding in navigating regulatory processes effectively. This service is designed to assist in regulatory strategies, submission support, and compliance for point-of-use diagnostic devices that are essential in various healthcare settings. The introduction of this service marks a significant step in providing support for companies involved in the development and manufacturing of such devices.

news.headline: OFN, EPA awardee for Clean Communities Investment Accelerator, issued statement following EPA's attempt to cancel funding.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Washington, Opportunity Finance Network (OFN), a recipient of the EPA's Clean Communities Investment Accelerator award, responded to the recent announcement by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA). OFN acknowledges the EPA's attempt to cancel the funding, which is a part of a larger initiative to promote clean communities.

news.headline: Plans to deploy American missiles in Europe destabilises the situation - Russia-Belarus Joint Statement.
Russia and Belarus consider NATO actions in the context of the Ukrainian crisis as hostile and destabilising, fraught with nuclear conflict - Russia-Belarus Joint Statement.
Crystal Group debuts RE0924 Industrial Workstation at DISTRIBUTECH® 2025 event in Hiawatha, Iowa, showcasing rugged tech solutions.
news.summary: Hiawatha, Iowa - Crystal Group, a prominent provider of rugged technology solutions, has announced the launch of the RE0924 Industrial Workstation during the DISTRIBUTECH® 2025 event.

news.headline: Treasury bills RIKV 25 0521 and RIKV 25 0917 to be auctioned at 10:30-11:00 am. Payments due by 14:00 on Settlement Date.
news.summary: The Government Debt Management will be holding an auction for Treasury bills in the Series on the Auction Date from 10:30 am to 11:00 am. The bills will have specific ISIN numbers and Maturity Dates as per the provided table. Payment for the Treasury bills needs to be completed by 14:00 on the Settlement Date at the Central Bank. The Bills will be electronically delivered on the same day as the payment.

news.headline: Danville, VA partners with Caliber Public Safety for advanced emergency response tech, modernizing services.
news.summary: In Danville, Virginia on March 13, 2025, a major advancement in public safety is underway as the City of Danville has chosen Caliber Public Safety to deliver a comprehensive set of cutting-edge emergency response technologies. This collaboration marks a significant step forward for Danville in enhancing public safety.

news.headline: Storyteq by ITG named Leader in Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Content Marketing Platforms for 3rd year.
news.summary: In London on March 13, 2025, Storyteq, a marketing technology owned by Inspired Thinking Group (ITG), was recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Content Marketing Platforms. This marks the third consecutive year Storyteq has earned this title. Storyteq's consistent designation as a Leader demonstrates its strong position in the industry.

news.headline: Element launched new weather experience on iOS, simplifying forecasts. Includes engaging visuals. Released on App Store today.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, on March 13, 2025, the new app Element debuted on the iOS App Store, offering a user-friendly way to access weather forecasts. Element simplifies intricate weather information, covering everything from sunny days to dangerous hurricanes. This app aims to revolutionize the way users interact with weather updates, providing a more engaging experience.

Info-Tech Research Group unveils top AI code generation tools for 2025, including ChatGPT; based on user reviews and performance.
news.summary: The 2025 AI Code Generation Data Quadrant Report from Info-Tech Research Group showcases the top solutions in the industry as per end user ratings. This report identifies the leading providers based on thorough user feedback, feature efficiency, vendor strengths, and overall performance.

US 4-Week Bill Auction
Inventor from Libertyville, Ill., creates MODIFIED BOOSTER carburetor to enhance racecar performance.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Libertyville, Illinois, shared his motivation for creating the MODIFIED BOOSTER to enhance the power and performance of racecars and drag racing vehicles. The inventor aimed to improve throttle response and generate increased power. This innovative carburetor design aims to boost overall performance and efficiency, potentially transforming the racing industry. Specific details regarding the degree of power increase and the expected impact on racecar and drag racing performance were not provided in the statement.

news.headline: Cast of H&R Block's "Responsibility Island" reunites in a YouTube special on March 13, bringing laughs & tax tips.
news.summary: Fans will have the opportunity to catch up with the cast in an exciting reunion airing on YouTube on Thursday, March 13th. The reunion promises to provide viewers with a glimpse of what the cast members have been busy with.

news.headline: Inflation data shows lower factory costs in Feb, leading to hopes for interest rate cuts in 2025. Tariff impact uncertain.
news.summary: February's Producer Price Index report revealed that all factory cost inflation measures were lower than expected. This news follows a decrease in the consumer price index data from the previous day, raising hopes for interest rate cuts in 2025. Gregory Daco, chief economist for EY-Parthenon, noted that the weak PPI data suggests disinflation was happening prior to tariff implementations. The report also highlighted surging egg prices as a key factor driving pressure on goods prices. As economists analyze this data, there is anticipation about how it may impact the U.S. economy in the future. The recent trends have prompted discussions about potential implications as the trade war continues to escalate.

news.headline: Opdyke Class A, LLC offers preferred equity combining solar+battery for Texas biofuels; reduces emissions.
news.summary: Opdyke Class A, LLC has introduced a preferred equity offering that integrates solar and battery storage to assist a Texas biofuels plant in cutting greenhouse gas emissions. The initiative aims to enhance sustainability and efficiency in the facility. The announcement was made on March 13, 2025, in San Francisco. The collaboration with Plural, an on-chain investing platform, signifies a step towards advancing the global shift towards cleaner energy sources. This move is expected to significantly contribute to reducing environmental impact and promoting renewable energy use in the region.

news.headline: VinFast VF 9 offers worry-free luxury on Canadian roads, focusing on after-sales service and premium driving experience.
news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, the electric vehicle market in Canada is evolving as consumers prioritize reliability, convenience, and premium driving experiences alongside range and performance. The VinFast VF 9 has emerged as a standout choice with its focus on top-tier after-sales service ensuring peace of mind and its offering of a sophisticated, high-tech driving experience. The Canadian electric vehicle market is particularly seeing growth in the segment of large, family-friendly electric SUVs. This shift is indicative of changing consumer preferences, with buyers now emphasizing not just range and performance, but also quality customer service and advanced technology in their electric vehicle choices.

news.headline: REV Group, Inc. (NYSE: REVG) releases 55-page 2024 Sustainability Report focusing on ESG performance for fiscal year 2024.
news.summary: REV Group, Inc. (NYSE: REVG), a prominent manufacturer of specialty vehicles such as fire trucks, ambulances, and RVs based in Brookfield, Wisconsin, has recently released its sixth annual corporate responsibility report. The comprehensive 55-page 2024 Sustainability Report highlights the company's Environmental, Social, and Corporate Governance (ESG) performance for the fiscal year 2024 (November 1, 2023, to October 31, 2024). The report emphasizes REV Group's commitment to sustainability as a core business responsibility beyond being just an initiative.

news.headline: SimForm adds compression molding tool design to its cloud-based simulation software, expanding capabilities significantly.
news.summary: SimForm, a top cloud-based simulation software for mold design, based in Montréal, has recently revealed a notable expansion of its services on March 13, 2025. Initially focused on enhancing the speed of injection mold design, the company has broadened its scope to include support for other types of mold design. This expansion is expected to enhance the company's offerings and cater to a wider range of clients.

news.headline: CODiE Awards, renowned for tech excellence, expand under new ownership in 2025 to spotlight innovation & inclusivity.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on March 13, 2025, the prestigious CODiE Awards, acknowledged for honoring technological excellence, are embarking on a fresh journey with a change in ownership. With close to four decades of history, the CODiE Awards are undergoing a significant expansion this year to showcase a wider array of innovations and talents.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of FTAI Aviation investors who suffered losses exceeding $100,000.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $100,000 in the company with the short name "FTAI" to get in touch with him directly. The period cited is from July 23, 2024, to January 15, ...

news.headline: Carr Workplaces reopens Central Park location at 745 Fifth Ave, Suite 500 in New York, blending Art Deco and modern design.
news.summary: In a recent update, Carr Workplaces is excited to reveal the official re-opening of its Central Park branch at 745 Fifth Avenue, Suite 500 in New York City. Situated in the bustling hub of Midtown Central, this renovated facility combines the charm of Art Deco style with contemporary amenities.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Ready Capital with losses exceeding $50,000 between Nov 7, 2024 - Mar. Contact James Wilson.
news.summary: Investors who experienced losses over $50,000 in Ready Capital between November 7, 2024 and March are encouraged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out for a discussion on their options.

news.headline: US gov creates Strategic Crypto Reserve amidst BTC policy shift, planning to integrate crypto into national finance, sparking debates.
news.summary: The United States government has revealed plans to establish a Strategic Bitcoin and Digital Asset Reserve as part of efforts to incorporate cryptocurrency into the country's financial system. This initiative has sparked discussions surrounding decentralization and optimal investment approaches. The decision has garnered significant attention, with experts and the public deliberating on the implications of this move on the national economy and financial landscape.

news.headline: Intel's stocks surge on track for highest one-day gain in five years.
Roxana Saidi of Táche named to 2025 Female Founders 500 List by Inc. for disrupting category with viral pistachio milk brand.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, Roxana Saidi, the Founder & CEO of Táche, a popular pistachio milk brand, was honored by Inc. for her innovative vision and groundbreaking contribution to the food and beverage industry. Inc., a renowned platform for entrepreneurs, included Saidi in its esteemed 2025 Female Founders 500 List. Saidi's creation of Táche has garnered widespread attention and praise, as the brand continues to disrupt the market with its unique product offering. This recognition reflects Saidi's impactful leadership in this sector, highlighting her role as a trailblazer in the industry.

news.headline: Staybridge Suites Denver North Thornton recognized with 2024 Torchbearer Award from IHG, highest honor.
news.summary: In Thornton, Colorado, Brandt Hospitality Group's Staybridge Suites Denver North Thornton has recently been awarded the esteemed 2024 Torchbearer award by InterContinental Hotels Group. This recognition marks the hotel's exceptional service and performance. Located at 13719, the hotel's dedication to excellence has earned it this prestigious honor.

news.headline: Forge launches Forge Direct: gamified hub for community growth. Developers can host customizable portals. Enticing over static websites.
news.summary: In San Francisco today, Forge, a prominent platform for community-driven game marketing and engagement, unveiled Forge Direct. This new release allows game developers to introduce personalized, comprehensive community portals that can be hosted on their own domain. These portals can fully replace or supplement a conventional game website. Unlike static landing pages commonly found on game websites, Forge provides developers with an interactive engagement tool that includes quests and various features. This innovation offers developers a user-friendly solution for enhancing player interaction.

news.headline: Inventor from Wheaton, IL creates Silent Cornhole/Bags set to reduce noise during parties.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Wheaton, Illinois shared their motivation behind creating a solution to address excessive noise during cornhole games at events. The inventor introduced the SILENT CORNHOLE/BAGS to help minimize distractions. This innovation aims to reduce the noise level during games.

news.headline: Investors of Polestar Automotive between Nov 14, 2022 and Jan 16, 2025, urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for claims.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner, James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Polestar to reach out to him directly to explore potential avenues. If you bought Polestar securities within the period of November 14, 2022, and January 16, 2025 and would like to deliberate on your options, contact him.

BMO and 1871 are seeking applications for 6th WMNfintech Program in Chicago. Deadline: April 10, 2025. empowers startup founders.
news.summary: Until April 10, 2025, interested individuals can submit their applications for the WMNfintech program in Chicago. The program is a collaboration between BMO and 1871, aiming to support startup founders in developing and expanding innovative services related to finance and technology.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $255.3 mln.
Novartis becomes the first corporate pharm partner of NFL, aiming to boost fans' health commitment. Covers Crucial Catch and Health and Safety Summit.
news.summary: A new exclusive pharmaceutical agreement has been established for the long term, aiming to translate fans' love for the game into a dedication to improved health. Novartis has partnered with the NFL, covering key health programs such as Crucial Catch and the yearly Health and Safety Summit EAST. This partnership seeks to leverage the NFL's wide-reaching platform to promote health initiatives and values.

news.headline: SeaWorld Orlando announces "Expedition Odyssey" Arctic adventure for 2025 with innovative tech, real-world footage, wildlife encounters.
news.summary: SeaWorld Orlando recently unveiled a groundbreaking Arctic expedition, offering an unparalleled ride technology that immerses visitors in stunning real-world footage and up-close encounters with Arctic wildlife. This experience, hailed as the most immersive Arctic adventure ever crafted, is set to revolutionize theme park experiences. The announcement was made on March 13, 2025, in Orlando, Florida. For media assets related to this exciting unveiling, interested parties can download them directly from the provided link.
